SeoText.title: Home Power Station: Reliable Energy Source in Any Conditions
SeoText.intro: With unstable power supply in Ukraine, a portable power station (home generator, battery backup, UPS for boiler) has become a necessity for apartments, private houses, offices and country homes. ChargeBase offers a modern 2400W portable power station with a lithium iron phosphate LiFePO4 battery — reliable backup power for blackouts, emergency outages and to keep your gas heating boiler running. We work on a direct-supply model from China, which allows you to buy a power station at the best price without overpaying middlemen.
SeoText.feature1: Our stations are equipped with lithium iron phosphate batteries that withstand over 3,500 charge cycles. That is over 10 years of daily use — 5x longer than standard lithium-ion batteries.
SeoText.feature2: Critical for the safe operation of gas boilers (Vaillant, Bosch, Baxi, Protherm), refrigerators, medical devices and sensitive computer equipment. Will not damage expensive electronics.
SeoText.feature3: Modern controllers allow you to charge the station to 80% in just 1.5–2 hours from a regular 220V outlet. Supports solar-panel charging for complete energy independence.
SeoText.feature4: Under current Ukrainian law, energy equipment (batteries and inverters) is imported at zero duty and VAT rates, making the purchase maximally cost-effective — no customs clearance at Nova Poshta.
SeoText.useCasesTitle: Who Needs a 2400W LiFePO4 Power Station
SeoText.useCases: A universal solution for those looking for a quiet, safe alternative to a petrol generator. Suitable for owners of gas heating boilers with circulation pumps, apartment dwellers needing power for fridge, Wi-Fi router, TV and lighting during scheduled outages. Also useful as a portable inverter for camping, hiking, country houses, garages and construction sites. Compatible with solar panels and serves as an affordable alternative to EcoFlow Delta, Bluetti AC200 and Anker SOLIX.
